{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/91620858?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Rootingg", "id": 91620858, "login": "Rootingg", "node_id": "U_kgDOBXYF-g", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54287", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-116", "name": "Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output"}], "description": "### Summary

On AWS Lambda, the ALB single-header response and the VPC Lattice v2 response join multiple `Set-Cookie` headers into one comma-separated value. Because commas also appear inside cookie attributes (for example `Expires` dates), clients cannot split the value back into individual cookies and silently drop or misparse them.

### Details

Per RFC 6265, each cookie must be its own `Set-Cookie` header line, and commas may appear inside attribute values. Joining cookies with `", "` collides with those commas, producing a value that clients cannot reliably split. Only ALB single-header mode and VPC Lattice v2 are affected; API Gateway v1/v2 and ALB with multi-value headers enabled already use an array and are unaffected.

### Impact

A client may receive only one of the cookies, a malformed cookie, or none. Session, CSRF, or preference cookies can silently fail to apply, breaking sessions or forcing re-authentication. This affects applications that set multiple cookies per response and run on AWS Lambda behind an ALB in single-header mode (the default) or VPC Lattice v2.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00186, "percentile": 0.08239}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j6c9-x7qj-28xf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T14:08:40Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j6c9-x7qj-28xf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j6c9-x7qj-28xf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54287"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-16T14:08:40Z", "references": ["https://github.com/honojs/hono/security/advisories/GHSA-j6c9-x7qj-28xf", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j6c9-x7qj-28xf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/honojs/hono/security-advisories/GHSA-j6c9-x7qj-28xf", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/honojs/hono", "summary": "hono: AWS Lambda adapter merges multiple `Set-Cookie` headers into one value, dropping cookies on ALB single-header and Lattice", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-16T14:08:41Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j6c9-x7qj-28xf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.12.25", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "hono"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.12.25"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: hono: AWS Lambda adapter merges multiple `Set-Cookie` headers into one value, dropping cookies on ALB single-header and Lattice
